Inter Milan Eye Roma’s Zalewski Amidst Competition from De Zerbi
arts.sum: Inter Milan are looking to bolster their squad following the departures of Tomás Palacios to Monza and Tajon Buchanan's imminent move to Villarreal. The club's focus has shifted to strengthening their wide positions rather than central defence, still hoping for Acerbi's recovery. The post Inter Milan Eye Roma’s Zalewski Amidst Competition from De Zerbi appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Champions League final group games: join us for updates on all 18 matches – live
arts.sum: Updates from a tantalising final round of games Manchester City v Club Brugge – live updates Live scoreboard | Who needs what | Email Scott Welcome to chaos. There are 36 clubs playing 18 fixtures to determine which eight qualify automatically for the Round of 16 and which 16 go into the play-off round. Here are those fixtures … Aston Villa v Celtic Barcelona v Atalanta Bayer Leverkusen v Sparta Prague Bayern Munich v Slovan Bratislava Borussia Dortmund v Shakhtar Donetsk Brest v Real Madrid Dinamo Zagreb v AC Milan Girona v Arsenal Internazionale v Monaco Juventus v Benfica Lille v Feyenoord Manchester City v Club Brugge PSV v Liverpool Red Bull Salzburg v Atletico Madrid Sporting v Bologna Sturm Graz v RB Leipzig Stuttgart v Paris Saint-Germain Young Boys v Red Star Belgrade Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Inter Milan looking to sign Arsenal player on the cheap – Plan in the works
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has been a bit-part player for Arsenal this season. The Ukrainian has made 13 appearances in all competitions, playing a little over 400 minutes. He has remained on the bench in the club’s last two games. As his game time continues to reduce at Arsenal, Zinchenko’s future is therefore under some question. InterLive The post Inter Milan looking to sign Arsenal player on the cheap – Plan in the works appeared first on Sport Witness.
